creator: joe@zircon.seattle.wa.us
text:
After playing around and experimenting with rhythmbox, it appears that 
it can successfully play ogg files but not ac4 files.  Some of my files 
are exported from iTunes and some were recorded on the FreeBSD box.  The 
file recorded on the FreeBSD box are all encoded with ogg, whereas the 
files imported from iTunes are ac4 files.  rhythm refuses to play the 
ac4 files, but does just fine with the ogg files.

/Joe
